headline: $15 Billion Changes the Conversation: Amazon's AI Disclosure, a Software Sector Under Siege, and Markets Hanging on Friday's Inflation Print
summary: Two days in a row of green closes and yet Thursday's session felt nothing like celebration. The Dow Jones and the Nasdaq extended Wednesday's relief rally, but the gains were narrow, the mood was cautious, and half the market was quietly bleeding.

raw.headline: $15 Billion Changes the Conversation: Amazon's AI Disclosure, a Software Sector Under Siege, and Markets Hanging on Friday's Inflation Print

headline: STZ Q1 Deep Dive: New CEO, Brand Investment, and Margin Pressures Shape Outlook
summary: Beer, wine, and spirits company Constellation Brands (NYSE:STZ) beat Wall Street’s revenue expectations in Q1 CY2026, but sales fell by 11.3% year on year to $1.92 billion. On the other hand, the company’s full-year revenue guidance of $9 billion at the midpoint came in 1.6% below analysts’ estimates. Its non-GAAP profit of $1.90 per share was 10.9% above analysts’ consensus estimates.

raw.headline: STZ Q1 Deep Dive: New CEO, Brand Investment, and Margin Pressures Shape Outlook
raw.summary: Beer, wine, and spirits company Constellation Brands (NYSE:STZ) beat Wall Street’s revenue expectations in Q1 CY2026, but sales fell by 11.3% year on year to $1.92 billion. On the other hand, the company’s full-year revenue guidance of $9 billion at the midpoint came in 1.6% below analysts’ estimates. Its non-GAAP profit of $1.90 per share was 10.9% above analysts’ consensus estimates.
